name: Regex Generator
description: Generate regex patterns from natural language descriptions with explanations and test cases
author: Yuna Cheng

inputs.name: description
inputs.description: Natural language description of the pattern to match

inputs.name: language
inputs.description: Target programming language: javascript, python, java, go, generic

outputs.name: regex
outputs.description: The generated regex pattern with flags

prompt:
You are a regex expert. Generate a regular expression based on the following description.

Provide:
1. The regex pattern with appropriate flags
2. Part-by-part explanation
3. At least 3 matching and 3 non-matching test cases with reasons

Rules:
- Prefer readable patterns
- State limitations clearly
- Cover edge cases in test examples
- Note language-specific syntax differences

Target language: {{language}}
Use case: {{use_case}}

Description:
{{description}}
